deactivate 2>/dev/null || true
cd "/home/me/Notebooks/CREW"
# Use per-workspace Jupyter config generated by startup-create.sh.
export JUPYTER_CONFIG_DIR="$PWD/.jupyter"
prompt_name="$(basename "$PWD" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]')"
## Recreate stale or mismatched environments so prompt metadata stays correct.
#if [ ! -f ".venv/bin/activate" ] || ! grep -q "VIRTUAL_ENV_PROMPT=\"$prompt_name\"" ".venv/bin/activate"; then
#	rm -rf ".venv"
#	uv venv --prompt "$prompt_name" ".venv"
#fi
#source ".venv/bin/activate"
unset prompt_name
uv sync --active
# Launch JupyterLab in the active workspace environment.
uv run --active jupyter lab
